shortDescription: Handles the anti-bot verification action and moves the applicant into the application.
Lets the applicant choose whether to continue with a BCeID login or proceed without one.

Determines whether the applicant can apply for a water licence and whether the project fits special eligibility categories - Ownership or possession of land OR representing BC Government or Federal Government.

Calculate with water usage / consumption for the requested water-use purpose(irrigation, industrial), sub-purpose(irrigation, livestock), seasonal use window, quantities, and purpose-specific details.
Captures details for an individual surface water source, including its name, characteristics, diversion point, and estimated dimensions.
Captures an individual contact associated with dam or reservoir information.
Captures the mailing address for an individual dam or reservoir contact.
Captures an organization contact associated with dam or reservoir details.
Captures the mailing address for an organization contact tied to dam or reservoir information.
Captures dam, reservoir, dugout, spillway, and contact details for storage-related works.
Collects fee exemption eligibility, category, and supporting details for government or First Nation applicants.
Captures whether the proposed works are shared, supplied through a Water Users' Community, or involve Crown land.
Screens for related authorizations, permits, and environmental or land-use impacts connected to the proposed works.
Maintains the list of surface water sources attached to the application.
Captures existing licence information, diversion source type, and the set of water-use purposes being applied for.
Captures the major works components, their construction status, and supporting details about the water system.
Main location step for land parcels, other affected lands, and map or drawing submission choices.
Provides a consolidated view of where water will be used, lands affected by the works, and drawing or mapping options.
Captures land information for other ownership categories where the water will be used.
Captures parcel, legal description, and title details for private land where the water will be used.
Captures legal, tenure, and reference details for provincial Crown land where the water will be used.
Uploads one or more map image or PDF files to support the application location.
Captures details for other ownership lands that are physically affected by the proposed works.
Captures owner and location details for private lands physically affected by the proposed works.
Captures legal and tenure details for provincial Crown lands physically affected by the proposed works.
Uploads GIS or spatial files that describe the application location.
Captures the document type and description for files uploaded with the application.
Records the applicant's confirmation that the privacy declaration has been read and accepted.
Captures a business co-applicant's organization and contact details.
Captures the primary company or organization applicant type, representative relationship, and business contact details.
Captures the primary individual applicant's personal and contact details.
Captures the mailing address for an individual co-applicant.
Captures an individual co-applicant's personal details and email.
Captures a referral or consultation contact and the applicant's consent for referral and First Nation consultation.
Records the applicant's declaration that the information on the form is complete and accurate.
Captures final comments, payment method, related application details, and the FrontCounter BC office for submission.
